properties.address: Churches Housing Action Team, Tiverton, Devon EX16 6LU
properties.description: Hub in Tiverton, for people struggling with housing/homelessness, debt and money, food and energy. An inclusive warm space with friendly faces, somewhere to have a cup of tea and a safe space.
properties.title: CHAT Community Hub

properties.address: Culm Valley Methodist Church, Cullompton, Devon EX15 2PL
properties.description: Bi-monthly coffee mornings and lunches. All free (donations welcome) Hot drinks and biscuits at the coffee mornings and an delicious lunch of homemade soups, sandwiches and desserts alternate months. Board games, quizes,dominoes and jigsaws. Warm, fully accessible church hall. Free WiFi available also off road car parking.
properties.title: Culm Valley Methodist Church

properties.address: Broadview Community Centre, Exeter, Devon EX5 3HA
properties.description: A warm safe space for everyone who lives in East Devon to enjoy. We provide a hot meal every session along with drinks and snacks, daily newspapers and magazines. We play games and make things, we have regular craft workshops but also budgeting advice, help accessing benefits and access to council services. There is always a warm welcome whether you want to join in, make friends, meet your neighbours or just want to sit and be quiet – we will welcome you. All activities and meals are free, including a Christmas dinner and Diwali feast!
properties.title: EDDC Community Hub

properties.address: Yonder Close Community Centre, Ottery St. Mary, Devon EX11 1HE
properties.description: A warm safe space for everyone who lives in East Devon to enjoy. We provide a hot meal every session along with drinks and snacks, daily newspapers and magazines. properties.address: Lazenby Road, Tiverton, Devon EX16 4AL EX16 4AL
properties.description: A vibrant and welcoming Community Centre in the Wilcombe area of Tiverton. The Cafe/Bar Area is always available for anyone to come into the warm and use our free public Wi-Fi.
properties.title: Sunningmead Community Centre

properties.description: Public Library with books, wifi, PCs, seating, activities for all, free warm coats rail, community fridge and freezer. Free hot drinks and cakes provided by Rotary Club of Tiverton on Friday mornings through the Winter.
properties.title: Tiverton Library
